metadata.description: Agent AI skill sets — Knowledge (Design Patterns, Refactoring, SOLID, Debugging, Clean Architecture, Testing, API Design, Security, Scrum, Performance, Microservices), Tools (Agentic Rules Writer), Frameworks (Symfony), and Agents (Scrum Master)

plugins.name: knowledge-virtuoso
plugins.description: All knowledge skills — design patterns, refactoring, SOLID, debugging, clean architecture, testing, API design, security, scrum, performance, and microservices. Includes Scrum Master agent.

plugins.name: setup-rules-writer
plugins.description: Generate a rules file for any AI coding agent. Interactive setup that scans installed skills, asks about workflow preferences, and writes a tailored instruction file for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini, Roo Code, or Amp

plugins.name: symfony-virtuoso
plugins.description: All 38 Symfony component skills — APIs, code patterns, configuration, and common use cases for PHP 8.3+ and Symfony 7.x
